name: editStory
description: Edits a story previously posted by the bot on behalf of a managed business account. Requires the can_manage_stories business bot right

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection

parameters.name: story_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the story to edit

parameters.name: caption
parameters.description: Caption of the story, 0-2048 characters after entities parsing

parameters.name: parse_mode
parameters.description: Mode for parsing entities in the story caption. See formatting options for more details.

parameters.name: caption_entities
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

parameters.name: areas
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of clickable areas to be shown on the story
